context: Tests whether the agent correctly builds a pre-campaign suppression system that excludes unengaged, bounced, spam-complaint, and unsubscribed contacts, enforces GDPR consent rules, protects the champions segment from discount campaigns, and validates minimum segment size.

checklist.name: Suppress unengaged (totalSent >= 5)
checklist.description: Suppression logic excludes subscribers classified as 'unengaged' who have received at least 5 emails (totalSent >= 5), not just any unengaged subscriber

checklist.name: Suppress bounced
checklist.description: Suppression logic excludes subscribers flagged as bounced

checklist.name: Suppress spam complaints
checklist.description: Suppression logic excludes subscribers with a spam complaint flag

checklist.name: Suppress unsubscribed
checklist.description: Suppression logic excludes subscribers where unsubscribedAt is set (not null)

checklist.name: Champions excluded from discount
checklist.description: The solution explicitly excludes the 'champions' segment from any discount or promotional campaign audience

checklist.name: Minimum segment size check
checklist.description: Code includes a guard or validation that prevents sending to segments with fewer than 200 contacts

checklist.name: marketingConsent filter
checklist.description: All segment queries filter on marketingConsent: true and exclude records where unsubscribedAt is set

checklist.name: GDPR consent basis enforcement
checklist.description: For EU contacts, the solution uses 'consent' as the lawful basis for marketing emails and does NOT accept 'legitimate-interest' as a valid basis for sending marketing emails

checklist.name: Engagement tier thresholds
checklist.description: Engagement tier classification uses openRate > 0.3 with daysSinceClick < 60 for 'champion', and openRate > 0.15 with daysSinceOpen < 90 for 'active'

checklist.name: Suppression applied before send
checklist.description: The suppression list is built and deduplicated against the target segment list before producing the final sendable audience — not as an afterthought

checklist.name: Deliverable output artifact
checklist.description: The solution produces a file or output (e.g., sendable list, suppression report, or validation results) that shows the final audience after suppression is applied
